overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a drive across the Golden Gate Bridge on a clear morning. The camera smoothly pans to admire the bay views and bridge architecture before continuing toward the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge roadway with red structural elements

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the bridge deck toward the distant tower

entered.detail: asphalt roadway with yellow lane markings
red vertical suspension cables lining both sides
tall red bridge tower in the distance
red curved street lamps along the bridge railing
green rolling hills on the left side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a smooth drive along the Golden Gate Bridge deck. Red suspension cables frame the view ahead toward the distant tower, with green hills visible to the left. The road is clear with no other vehicles in immediate view.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge span with panoramic bay views

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the bay water and coastal hills
blue sedan overtakes on the right side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive while looking left at the scenic water and hills

notable_agents.action: blue sedan overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: calm blue water of the bay
green forested hills along the coastline
large cargo vessel with red containers visible in the water
red metal lattice railing along the bridge edge

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to showcase the scenic bay views while continuing to drive. A blue sedan overtakes on the right. The water, cargo ship, and coastal hills dominate the left side of the frame, while the bridge tower moves to the right edge of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge tower passage with structural steel archway

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the tower structure and cables from below
camera tilts back down to resume forward driving view

agents.ego_description: driving through the tower shadow while examining the massive structure above

entered.detail: archway at the base of the tower

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes through the bridge tower as the camera tilts upward to admire the massive red steel structure and converging cables against the blue sky. The scenic bay views exit the frame as the tower dominates the view.

events.description: blue car visible driving ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: resuming forward drive toward the city with sun glare on the right side

notable_agents.action: blue car driving ahead on the bridge deck

entered.detail: city skyline visible at the end of the bridge

segments.scene_description: After passing the tower, the camera returns to a forward-facing view showing the continuation of the bridge toward the distant city. A blue car is visible ahead, and the red street lights resume along the sides of the bridge deck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive across the Golden Gate Bridge, transitioning from a focused forward path to an expansive panoramic view before returning to the road toward the city. It begins with a smooth glide along the bridge deck, where red suspension cables frame a view of distant towers and green hills. As the vehicle progresses, the camera pans left to reveal the blue waters of the bay, a cargo ship, and coastal hills, just as a blue sedan overtakes on the right. The scene then shifts as the vehicle passes through the bridge tower, with the camera tilting upward to capture the massive red steel structure and converging cables against a clear blue sky. Finally, the view returns to the road ahead, following a blue car toward the distant city skyline as red street lights reappear along the sides of the deck.
